CVE-2017-6627.description: SNMP community string disclosure allows unauthenticated remote information gathering via crafted SNMP requests.
CVE-2017-6627.remediation: Disable SNMPv1/v2c; migrate to SNMPv3 with authPriv (SHA + AES-128). Restrict with: snmp-server community <string> RO <ACL>

CVE-2018-0171.affected: Cisco IOS and IOS XE — Smart Install (TCP/4786)
CVE-2018-0171.description: Smart Install buffer overflow allows unauthenticated remote code execution. Actively exploited in the wild by threat actors including APT groups.
CVE-2018-0171.remediation: no vstack — disables Smart Install. Verify with: show vstack config

CVE-2021-1554.description: HTTP server authentication bypass leading to privilege escalation. Attacker can gain level-15 access without credentials.
CVE-2021-1554.remediation:
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
If required, restrict with: ip http access-class <ACL> in

CVE-2023-20198.affected: Cisco IOS XE — Web UI (HTTP/HTTPS management interface)
CVE-2023-20198.description: Unauthenticated remote code execution via IOS XE web management interface. Mass-exploited ITW; attackers created privileged local accounts and deployed implants.
CVE-2023-20198.remediation:
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
Apply Cisco Security Advisory patch immediately. If web UI required, restrict to trusted subnets.

CVE-2020-3187.description: Path traversal allows unauthenticated read and delete of files from flash filesystem. Can be used to steal configs containing password hashes.
CVE-2020-3187.remediation: Apply Cisco patch. Disable clientless SSL VPN if not required: webvpn / no enable outside

CVE-2016-6385.description: Memory leak in Smart Install processing causes device reload, enabling denial-of-service against network infrastructure.
CVE-2016-6385.remediation: no vstack — disable Smart Install entirely
